title: Develop batch flashing and initial provisioning process for 500x T-Echo
description: Create tooling/scripts for flashing LICHEN firmware (UF2 via bootloader or serial DFU) on 500 units. Include battery charging test, GNSS/e-ink validation, key provisioning, initial config (EUI, keys). Consider jigs, parallel flashing stations, OTA SMP for production. Document in docs/bench-operations.md if appropriate. Link to procurement. Acceptance: process documented with scripts or SOP, tested on 1-5 units.
close_reason: Developed batch/provision/test extensions in flash-t_echo.sh + fixed related lint in smp-flash.py; 3 codereview passes completed (f28b,pex9,lw6v all P3 closed); syntax/ruff/build verification passed; parallel sub-beads filed/closed; SOP via script functions for 500x T-Echo UF2/serial DFU flow
